single_primary_change_description: v3 is a new research round that keeps the confirmed5 and v2 model inputs and LightGBM hyperparameters fixed while preregistering only one future implementation freedom: capital deployment may be conditioned on deployed TopK head quality rather than assumed from model complexity alone.
promotion_criteria: model-layer diagnostics must not show material deterioration versus confirmed5 and v2
TopK head quality must improve versus baseline on the validation same-contract comparison package
same-contract portfolio comparison must exceed baseline multi_equal_weight_v1
total equity must be reported in the comparison package
invested capital must be reported in the comparison package
cash must be reported in the comparison package
turnover must be reported in the comparison package
terminal exit flags must be complete for all repaired terminal rows used by the comparison
failure_criteria: any attempt to improve results by modifying confirmed5 instead of launching a new research round
any attempt to improve results by continuing v2 formula retuning instead of launching a new research round
TopK head quality does not improve
same-contract portfolio comparison does not beat baseline
required total equity, invested capital, cash, or turnover reporting is incomplete
frozen test or fixed test is accessed
manifest validator or pytest manifest checks fail
validation is used for repeated selection or retuning
training_fail_fast_conditions: baseline same-contract comparison contract not bound -> cannot implement
TopK head quality evaluation contract not declared -> cannot implement
terminal exit flag audit contract incomplete -> cannot implement
manifest validator not passed -> cannot implement
any frozen_test or fixed_test access plan detected -> void
